footerLeftPanel - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.LeftPanel
 
FooterLeftPanel - Class in fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels
Creates the bottom panel of the LeftPanel, containing navigation buttons (Prev/Next).
